en.description: This white paper analyzes the impact of AI agents on the SaaS business, outlines the strategies SaaS companies should adopt, and shares the real story of QueryPie AI's transformation from a SaaS vendor to an AI-native company.
en.rawFrontmatter:
layout: "Article"
category: "whitepaper"
title: "The End of SaaS, or Its Evolution? — Strategies SaaS Companies Must Adopt in the Age of AI Agents"
description: "This white paper analyzes the impact of AI agents on the SaaS business, outlines the strategies SaaS companies should adopt, and shares the real story of QueryPie AI's transformation from a SaaS vendor to an AI-native company."
date: "2026-03-12"
author: "terazawa"
ogImage: "public/documentation/white-papers/wp-thumb-30-en.webp"
keywords: ["QueryPie", "QueryPie AI", "Death of SaaS", "AI agents", "SaaS strategy", "AI-native company", "AI transformation", "AI platform", "MCP"]

ja.description: 本ホワイトペーパーは、AIエージェントがSaaSビジネスに与える影響を分析し、SaaS企業が取るべき戦略と、QueryPie AI自身のSaaSベンダーからAI Native企業への変革の実録をお伝えします。
keywords: AIトランスフォーメーション
